content.en:
Among the many realms outside the Eternal True Ruins, it was so difficult to give birth to a Boundary-Breaking Fifth Stage Great Ancestor, it was even more difficult than breaking through to become a Heavenly Ancestor.

What's more, it is still inside the Eternal True Ruins, which is isolated from the outside world, and it is impossible for a creature like the Golden Thorn Tree to follow the path of a cultivator from the outside world, and it can even become a boundary breaking level.

Obviously, the physical body of this Golden Thorn Tree was already comparable to or even stronger than an ordinary Heavenly Ancestor, otherwise it would not be able to become a boundary-breaking existence.

"Sure enough, there is a boundary-breaking existence inside the Eternal True Ruins!"

The True Night Ancestor said secretly.

Now.

The other six Heavenly Ancestors wanted to escape, but they were afraid that if they did, this Boundary-Breaking Golden Thorn Tree would hunt them down.

In that case, they are in danger.

The point is, they don't know if it's just this one Boundary-Breaking Golden Thorn Tree!

If there were a few more boundary-breaking creatures, they might all be wiped out.

"You shouldn't have come in!"

A Heavenly Ancestor repented.

It is rumored that a long time ago, there was a Heavenly Ancestor who fell inside the Eternal True Ruins, and during that period of time, the Heavenly Ancestors did not dare to enter the Eternal True Ruins again.

They also knew the dangers of the Eternal True Ruins, but they were attracted by the Xuantian Platinum.

Originally, they thought that even many invincible-level fifth-stage ancestors had come out alive, their strength was stronger, they had more hole cards, and it stands to reason that there was a great hope of survival.

But they never expected that they still encountered a life-and-death crisis.

Swish!

The True Night Ancestor continued to rush towards Xuantian Platinum, and he didn't want to give up.

Thundered!!!!

The True Night Ancestor and the Golden Thorn Tree fought, but the True Night Ancestor still fell into disadvantage.

Although they are all boundary-breaking level, the True Night Ancestor is still a little uncomfortable with the environment here, and the Golden Thorn Tree is a native creature of the Eternal True Ruins, so it can fully exert its strength.

"Run!"

Yinheng Heavenly Ancestor took advantage of this opportunity and immediately chose to flee for their lives.

Whew!!

Six rays of light traveled through the void and departed.

However, a monstrous hand instantly covered the area.

Another Boundary-Breaking Class has appeared!

However, this Breaking Realm was not a Golden Thorn Tree, but a humanoid creature covered in scales.

Burst!!!!

The six Heavenly Ancestors were directly slapped away, and their flesh continued to crack.

"Burn flesh and blood, or you won't be able to escape!"

Yin Heng Heavenly Ancestor said.

Soon, they burned their flesh and blood and will, and many hole cards were no longer left, and they sacrificed their hole cards and the last life-saving things.

At the same time, they scattered and fled, so that there was hope of escaping.

......

"What's the situation, why is the battle fluctuating stronger and stronger?"

Ye Tian felt that he was too dangerous now, I was afraid that he would not be able to successfully replicate the Infinite Realm Armor Warrior here.

He's not afraid of falling, but he's got that white crystal, so he has to take it out!

"I can only replicate the native creatures of the Eternal Ruins!"

He'd tried to replicate the native creatures of the Eternal Ruins before, but these native creatures were also territorial, and they would still be killed if they went to other territories.

Other than that.

He can only copy the creatures of the fourth stage, and even if such creatures are copied, they are too weak and meaningless, and they will die if they are not careful, and even if they find treasures, they will not be able to bring them back.

That's why he never did.

But now, he must use native creatures to preserve the white crystal.

He didn't need to run away, he just needed to stay.

Soon.

A native creature at the peak of the fourth stage was copied by him, and then the white crystals were hidden in the native creature's body and sealed layer by layer.

Subsequently.

The native creature began to move slowly outward.

The area was safe, and he just had to move to the edge of the area, away from the center of the battle.

And Ye Tian's true body copied his body and continued to copy the Infinite Realm Armor.

Not long after, a figure tore through the void and fled at great speed.

"Heavenly Ancestor!"

Ye Tian was surprised.

The Heavenly Ancestor had actually entered the Eternal True Ruins, and it seemed that he was still running away.

Judging from the situation of copying talent probing, this Heavenly Ancestor is a Giant Eye Heavenly Ancestor.

The Giant Eye Heavenly Ancestor also noticed Ye Tian, but he didn't have the heart to observe Ye Tian at all, he just wanted to escape at the moment.

"Not good!"

The Giant Eye Heavenly Ancestor's face changed, and the boundary-breaking creature actually chased and killed him.

Bang!!!!

The battle broke out, and the terrifying power permeated the surrounding territory.

And Ye Tian was within the scope of this area, so he didn't escape in time.

The battle of the Boundary Breaking Level is far from being comparable to him.

In an instant, he was shattered to death.

......

"It's a good thing that the white crystal was given to the native creature to replicate the body, otherwise the thing would have been gone!"

Ye Tian said happily.

But he couldn't guarantee whether the native creature would succeed in escaping.

Due to the boundary-breaking level battle, many native creatures in the core area are fleeing.

And Ye Tian's native creature copy body also encountered many native creatures, many of which were comparable to the invincible-level fifth-stage combat power.

They only glanced at Ye Tian, a native creature, and left directly.

For them, Ye Tian's replica body is an ant, and it also belongs to the Eternal True Ruins.

Moreover, this was not their territory, they were all fleeing, so they did not attack Ye Tian.

As time passed, Ye Tian gradually came to the edge of this area, and gradually stopped not feeling the fluctuations of the battle.

If he continues to move forward, he will not belong to the safe zone, and will enter the territory of other creatures, and his copy body will also be attacked.

"When the battle of those Heavenly Ancestors and Boundary-Breaking Creatures is over, I will copy the Infinite Realm Armor Warrior again, and then cover and leave!" Ye Tian thought.

Time passed slowly, and the fighting gradually stopped.

......

Outside the Eternal Ruins.

One Heavenly Ancestor after another came out in embarrassment, and among them, there were even Heavenly Ancestors who only had a small part of their bodies left, and their energy was almost exhausted, and they couldn't even recover their bodies.

"The Giant Eye Heavenly Ancestor hasn't escaped yet!"

Yin Heng Heavenly Ancestor said.

Here they continued to wait, healing their wounds.

Swish!

The True Night Ancestor came out, and his physical injuries were not light, but he was much better than several Heavenly Ancestors.

These Heavenly Ancestors could only glare angrily, and did not attack the True Night Ancestor.

The True Night Ancestor waved his hand and fled directly.

A period of time has passed, and the Giant Eye Heavenly Ancestor still hasn't come out.

After some deduction, they settled on a message.

"The Giant Eye Heavenly Ancestor has fallen!"

The news came out quickly, shocking countless Great Ancestors.

And the power of the Giant Eye Heavenly Ancestor is about to decline, even if it is not destroyed, it will not regain its former glory.
